strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes
Direct AI agent development experience — builds MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong testing culture: TDD/CI/CD/trunk-based development practice, authored test frameworks, and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the résumé
No Kotlin and no Python listed; Java experience appears dated (robotics work 2016-2018)
No explicit mention of Vitest, Jest, or Playwright, despite a clear general testing background
response.justification: The role requires deep TypeScript/Node/React fullstack skills, testing expertise, cloud/container knowledge, and AI agent experience. The candidate demonstrates the primary stack concretely (pricing platform at Optilyz with TypeScript, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK; GraphQL/Node at RIDE), cloud and containerization (Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective, Docker dev-ops at Altom), and AI agent development (MCP code generators and agentic frameworks at re:cinq) — a rare, explicitly required skill. Testing competency is evidenced through TDD practice, authored test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and teaching, though the specific frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are absent from the résumé, as are Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python. Experience well exceeds the 6+ year bar and a CS degree is present. The gaps are framework-level and likely learnable given breadth across languages; the required competencies are otherwise well-evidenced.
